side_effects.description: Initial mild local itching at injection site, progressed over time
Progressed to immediate itching and swelling of hands on subsequent dose
Tongue and throat swelling with palpitations on next dose; near-anaphylactic reaction managed with pre-taken Benadryl with 911 pre-dialed

protocol_notes: Self-identified RN with 30+ years experience. Took nightly Benadryl during peptide use. Had pre-taken Benadryl ~30 minutes before the severe reaction which may have helped manage the episode. Confirms proper injection technique was used.
